title: more mounts and mayhem
description: Ride ravagers and sniffers, craft the new swiftness boots and the crab claw !
body:
enjoy two new mounts, with 4 new items :

the lasso:

![lasso recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4fd6cb25a9ebe557295e8ad4cc2201321909107.png)
upgrade a lead with a netherite ingot and a netherite smithing template to make a Lasso, you can use the Lasso to ride ravagers, you can control a ravager with WASD like regular mounts, be careful tho as the ravager is still trying to kill you, keep that in mind when you decide to dismount !



the torchflower seed on a stick:

![torchflower seed on a stick recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/063d3b2d1938c15939ced6867fba0d7f5066e8a0.png)
craft the torchflower seed on a stick with a torchflower seed and a fishing rod, you can then right click on a sniffer to ride it, you can't control the sniffer but it will keep going forward in the direction you're looking when holding the torchflower seed on a stick, like you would ride a pig !



the crab claw:

![crab claw recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45cf2e41c010ddd218d902cc9369dc3293022ca0.png)
this is an item from my datapck KS Crab Claw but I figured it could fit here, craft the crab claw with a shear and 4 turtle shells, the crab claw extend your block reach when placed in one of your hands.



the swiftness boots:

![swiftness boots recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0524f6147321ec8c39d332466923409f7564d77c.png)
the swiftness boots are special leather boots crafted with a feather and leather boots, it gives you +20% movement speed when worn.



bonus features : snowballs can stack up to 64 !


/!\ Make sure to use the resourcepack to see the items textures and translations


If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !
